events.title: MotoGP Czech Republic Grand Prix 2026
events.note: The MotoGP World Championship returns to the legendary Automotodrom Brno, featuring intense racing action on the 5.403-kilometer circuit with 14 corners and significant elevation changes. The event draws tens of thousands of fans from across Central Europe every year.
events.marketing_angle: Experience the thrill of MotoGP racing at the iconic Brno circuit, a must-visit event for motorsport enthusiasts.
events.why_selected: The MotoGP Czech Republic Grand Prix is a premier event in the Czech motorsport calendar, attracting a large local and international audience.

events.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Czechia vs Mexico
events.note: Czech national team match at a major world football tournament. Treat as the strongest Czech-relevant weekly sports storyline and keep visuals symbolic with no official logos, badges, player likenesses, or protected tournament identity.
events.marketing_angle: personal greeting before a big Czech national team match
events.why_selected: Czech national team match at a football World Cup must be prioritized when it falls in the target week.

events.title: International Day Against Drug Abuse and Illicit Trafficking
events.note: Important international awareness day for thoughtful Melody4U content. Use hopeful, supportive language and avoid fearmongering, shock visuals, or graphic imagery.
events.marketing_angle: thoughtful awareness message with hope and support
events.why_selected: A main international significant day in the target week; serious topics should be handled with awareness tone, not skipped.

events.title: Memorial Day for Victims of the Communist Regime / Political Prisoners
events.note: Czech memorial day requiring calm, dignified and respectful visual language. No hype, no sensationalism, and no disturbing imagery.
events.marketing_angle: respectful remembrance for a Czech audience
events.why_selected: A major Czech memorial day in the target week; it should be included with respectful memorial tone rather than ignored.

events.title: Formula 1 Austrian Grand Prix 2026
events.note: The Red Bull Ring in Austria hosts the Austrian Grand Prix, a key race in the Formula 1 calendar. The circuit's compact layout and elevation changes provide a challenging environment for drivers, promising an exciting race weekend.
events.marketing_angle: Witness high-speed action and strategic battles as the world's top drivers compete at the scenic Red Bull Ring.
events.why_selected: The Austrian Grand Prix is a significant event for motorsport fans in the Czech Republic, given its proximity and the popularity of Formula 1.

events.title: MotoGP Dutch Grand Prix 2026
events.note: The TT Circuit Assen in the Netherlands hosts the Dutch Grand Prix, a historic race known for its unique layout and passionate fan base. The event is a highlight of the MotoGP season, featuring top riders competing on a challenging track.
events.marketing_angle: Experience the excitement of MotoGP racing at the legendary Assen circuit, a must-see event for motorsport fans.
events.why_selected: The Dutch Grand Prix is a significant event in the MotoGP calendar, attracting a large international audience, including Czech fans.

events.title: St. John the Baptist's Day
events.note: A traditional Czech holiday celebrating St. John the Baptist, often associated with midsummer festivities, bonfires, and cultural events.
events.marketing_angle: Join in the midsummer celebrations with traditional Czech customs, music, and community gatherings.
events.why_selected: St. John the Baptist's Day is a cherished tradition in Czech culture, offering rich content for community engagement and cultural promotion.

events.title: Summer Solstice 2026
events.note: The longest day of the year, marking the official start of summer in the Northern Hemisphere. A time for outdoor activities, festivals, and celebrating the abundance of daylight.
events.marketing_angle: Celebrate the arrival of summer with outdoor adventures and cultural festivities under the extended daylight hours.
events.why_selected: The Summer Solstice is a globally recognized event, offering opportunities for community engagement and seasonal promotions.
